subcodes.first_line: O thou servant who turneth thy heart toward God! Rejoice in that which God hath confirmed thee with, and be thou quickened by the fragrances of the gardens [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها العبد المتوجه بقلبه الی الله استبشر بما ایدک الله و احیاک بنفحات ریاض
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @spiritual transformation
